question_text: The electromagnetic spectrum can be arranged in order of wavelength. Which of the following lists four types of electromagnetic wave in order from longest to shortest wavelength?

options.label: A
options.text: Radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light

options.label: B
options.text: Visible light, infrared, microwaves, radio waves

options.label: C
options.text: Radio waves, visible light, infrared, microwaves

options.label: D
options.text: Microwaves, radio waves, visible light, infrared

correct_answer: A) Radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light
explanation: Radio waves have the longest wavelengths in the EM spectrum, while visible light has a much shorter wavelength. The correct order from longest to shortest is radio waves, microwaves, infrared, and then visible light. This order is fixed because wavelength and frequency are inversely related.
